## [00:00 - 03:03]

Okay, so now I want to talk about scarcity with evergreen launches because this is one of the the trickiest things is how do you deal with scarcity is from going through product launch formula. As you know scarcity is one of the most powerful mental triggers there is especially when it comes down to basically the launch, the opening card, and especially the closing card. Lots of times these days we're seeing the final day of the launch of the card open being bigger than the first day because of the scarcity. So scarcity is really really powerful so how do we do that if there's an evergreen launch? So generally the rule of thumb is evergreen launches are awesome. There's lots of cool things about them but you do give up a little bit and one of them I think is you give up a little bit in terms of scarcity in many markets. So I think the best way to deal with this is like here's your you know let's say this is this is your evergreen launch and this is you know first we have the squeeze page actually let's a meadow back to here we go we've got the squeeze page and then they come in here and here's pre-launch content one and then two and then three you know we go through here and so if this person joining your list is you know Fred at Gmail or wherever if they join your list here then they run through your sequence and that sequence ends up on this sales letter you know do you open the cart they go to the sales letter and then they've got you know whatever three days until this is the current close or the current closes okay so basically Fred he goes through this pre-launch and now you give him this offer and you've got three days and he has three days to take advantage of whatever that special offer and as we know from product launch formula you know there's basically three primary ways to develop scarcity one is the product goes off the market the other one is the price increases and the third one is bonuses go away of course you can do all of those or a couple of those whatever you want but those are the main ways of developing scarcity for your offer okay so here's you know this is this is a cart close right here and you have scarcity and you're emailing you know Fred joined your launch list and Fred basically has

world those type of things can happen and depending on your market they probably will you know if you're selling stuff into the knitting market they're probably not going to figure this stuff out but you know if you're selling something into the internet marketing world you know a few of them are going to figure that out probably or they might just come across your site six months later this is sequence again if that happens the reality is they're probably not even going to remember that they went through it the first time people just are not as wrapped up in your material as you are you ## [09:07 - 11:07]

month or every quarter another way you could do it is you can rotate offers so if we go back to in the last video where I was talking about you know basically where you do a launch every week you know I walk through that you know here's here's week one here's week two so this is launch number one you know this is week number two this is launch number two in and and and you know maybe this week for this sequence you've got you know some special a bonus report if they buy they get the special report or the special DVD you know maybe this week they get a bonus call you know maybe this week they get a bonus DVD so when they come into your world here you get you know you make this offer when they come into the world here they make this offer when they come into the world there they make you they get a different offer or you could have pricing or whatever so you can basically you know switch up your offers each week depending on when people come into your world and then you could run people through this sequence and then you could maybe give them a break and then the people that join for that launch if they didn't buy you can try them for this sequence because maybe they'll like that bonus so there's a lot of mixing and matching that can be done throughout this whole thing with the scarcity but the number one thing with the scarcity the way I approach it is they get they get the deal based on when they come into your universe and if they are smart enough or they figure it out that they can they can enter your universe again with a different email address then they go through your sequence again so there you go scarcity for evergreen lunch
